references.hebrew: וַיָּמֻ֙תוּ֙ הָֽאֲנָשִׁ֔ים מוֹצִאֵ֥י דִבַּת־הָאָ֖רֶץ רָעָ֑ה בַּמַּגֵּפָ֖ה לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
references.english: those who spread such calumnies about the land died of plague, by G<small>OD</small>’s will.

references.hebrew: וַיֵּ֨רְד֜וּ הֵ֣ם וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֥ר לָהֶ֛ם חַיִּ֖ים שְׁאֹ֑לָה וַתְּכַ֤ס עֲלֵיהֶם֙ הָאָ֔רֶץ וַיֹּאבְד֖וּ מִתּ֥וֹךְ הַקָּהָֽל׃
references.english: They went down alive into Sheol, with all that belonged to them; the earth closed over them and they vanished from the midst of the congregation.

references.hebrew: יְהֹוָ֖ה מֵמִ֣ית וּמְחַיֶּ֑ה מוֹרִ֥יד שְׁא֖וֹל וַיָּֽעַל׃
references.english:
GOD deals death and gives life,
Casts down into Sheol and raises up.

references.hebrew: תָּעִ֗יתִי כְּשֶׂ֣ה אֹ֭בֵד בַּקֵּ֣שׁ עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּ֥י מִ֝צְוֺתֶ֗יךָ לֹ֣א שָׁכָֽחְתִּי׃ {פ}
references.english:
I have strayed like a lost sheep;
search for Your servant,
for I have not neglected Your commandments.

references.hebrew: וַיִּקַּ֣ח קֹ֔רַח בֶּן־יִצְהָ֥ר בֶּן־קְהָ֖ת בֶּן־לֵוִ֑י וְדָתָ֨ן וַאֲבִירָ֜ם בְּנֵ֧י אֱלִיאָ֛ב וְא֥וֹן בֶּן־פֶּ֖לֶת בְּנֵ֥י רְאוּבֵֽן׃
references.english: Now Korah, son of Izhar son of Kohath son of Levi, betook himself,abetook himself Lit. “took”; nuance of Heb. uncertain. along with Dathan and Abiram sons of Eliab, and On son of Peleth—descendants of Reubenbdescendants of Reuben According to 26.5, 8–9, Eliab was son of Pallu, son of Reuben.—

references.hebrew: בְּסֹדָם֙ אַל־תָּבֹ֣א נַפְשִׁ֔י בִּקְהָלָ֖ם אַל־תֵּחַ֣ד כְּבֹדִ֑י כִּ֤י בְאַפָּם֙ הָ֣רְגוּ אִ֔ישׁ וּבִרְצֹנָ֖ם עִקְּרוּ־שֽׁוֹר׃
references.english:
Let not my person be included in their council,
Let not my being be counted in their assembly.
For when angry they slay a man,aa man Or “a rival,” or “men.”
And when pleased they maim an ox.bmaim an ox Or “overthrow a dignitary” (cf. chapter 34); or “maim oxen.”

references.hebrew: וַיִּֽקָּהֲל֞וּ עַל־מֹשֶׁ֣ה וְעַֽל־אַהֲרֹ֗ן וַיֹּאמְר֣וּ אֲלֵהֶם֮ רַב־לָכֶם֒ כִּ֤י כׇל־הָֽעֵדָה֙ כֻּלָּ֣ם קְדֹשִׁ֔ים וּבְתוֹכָ֖ם יְהֹוָ֑ה וּמַדּ֥וּעַ תִּֽתְנַשְּׂא֖וּ עַל־קְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָֽה׃
references.english: They combined against Moses and Aaron and said to them, “You have gone too far! For all the community are holy, all of them, and G<small>OD</small> is in their midst. Why then do you raise yourselves above G<small>OD</small>’s congregation?”

references.hebrew: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יְהֹוָ֔ה זַעֲקַ֛ת סְדֹ֥ם וַעֲמֹרָ֖ה כִּי־רָ֑בָּה וְחַ֨טָּאתָ֔ם כִּ֥י כָבְדָ֖ה מְאֹֽד׃
references.english: Then G<small>OD</small> said, “The outrage of Sodom and Gomorrah is so great, and their sin so grave!
